title: Paris has the best Crepes
description: Paris is the last stop of my Oasis trip. Amaxing food, beautiful architecture, and the vibrant atmosphere makes it the perfect ending to our journey.
coverAlt: The Eiffel Tower illuminated in golden light at night with visitors gathered at its base

images.alt: The Eiffel Tower glowing golden against the night sky, its beacon light sweeping horizontally, crowds gathered below
images.caption: Beautiful shinny Eiffel tower.

images.alt: A chocolate crepe drizzled with sauce on a striped plate, beside a savory galette with greens at a Parisian café
images.caption: The best crepes I have ever had.
